ChangeNotes.Value: v1.3.1 - Type any AI model id in Mod Options (asked for on Nexus): each cloud backend's model dropdown now has a '(type any id)' field right below it - while it holds text it overrides the dropdown; clear it and the dropdown chooses again. Use any Anthropic or OpenAI id, or anything from OpenRouter's full catalog, pasted exactly as openrouter.ai/models spells it. Takes effect on the very next reply, no restart. Unlisted models work fine - the cost estimate just may not know their prices, and a mistyped id tells you so plainly.
